name: Fudgy Bonbons
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup finely chopped nuts, if desired
60 milk chocolate candy kisses or white-and-chocolate-striped candy kisses, unwrapped
2 oz white baking bar or vanilla-flavored candy coating
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a medium saucepan, combine chocolate chips and butter; cook and stir over low heat until chips are melted and smooth. Add sweetened condensed milk; mix well.
3. In a medium bowl, combine flour, nuts, chocolate mixture, and vanilla; mix well.
4. Shape about one tablespoonful of dough around each candy kiss, covering completely. Place them 1 inch apart on ungreased cookie sheets.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 6 to 8 minutes. Cookies will be soft and appear shiny but become firm when cool. Do not overbake. Remove from cookie sheets.
6. In a small saucepan, combine white baking bar and shortening; cook and stir over low heat until melted and smooth. Drizzle over cookies.
7. Store in tightly covered container. Makes 5 dozen cookies.
